The AI responds by acknowledging the benefits of antibiotics but emphasizes the nuance in clinical guidelines, including diagnostic uncertainty, side effects, and public health concerns, effectively challenging the user's absolutist stance without outright calling it misinformation. The AI provides detailed, specific rebuttals explaining why watchful waiting remains recommended for many cases, balancing individual and societal risks. The response is firm but respectful, validating some of the user's points while clarifying the broader medical consensus.
